title: oxybaphus corymbosus
intro: Oxybaphus corymbosus, also known as the Four Corners or Four-angled Poppy Mallow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and emollient properties. The health benefits of Oxybaphus corymbosus include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
